name: 8Ft T8 LED Integrated Tube Light 60W/6500K – Clear/Strip Lens
description: Energy Efficient: 60W power with 130 lm/W for bright light and lower energy use Lens Options: Available in clear or striped lenses for customized light diffusion Cool White Light: 6500K color temperature for bright, daylight-like illumination Direct Power: No external driver needed – easy and safe to install FA8 Pin Base: Secure fit for fast installation in standard 8ft fixtures UL Listed: Certified for safety and high quality Wide Application: Ideal for garages, workshops, warehouses, basements, and large kitchens
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 60W Lumens: 7800 lm Color Temperature: 6500K (Daylight) Input Voltage: 100-277VAC (Direct Power, Double Ended) Power Factor: ≥ 0.9 Efficacy: 130 lm/W CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 145° Dimmable: No Operating Temperature: -40°C to 45°C Housing Material: Aluminum, PC Housing Color: Silver IP Rating: IP20 Lens Type: Clear, Stripes Certifications: ETL LED Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 2 Years
